product: Genie One search and discovery improvements
tagline: Databricks Apps filtering: Genie One consumers can now filter to include or exclude inactive Databricks apps when browsing.
what_it_does: Databricks Apps filtering: Genie One consumers can now filter to include or exclude inactive Databricks apps when browsing. Inactive apps are those with a status other than Running, such as Stopped, Deploying, or Crashed. Dashboard widget title search: Search now supports dashboard widget titles.
why_it_matters: Stopped The app is not accessible and doesn't incur any costs.
key_takeaway: Databricks Apps filtering: Genie One consumers can now filter to include or exclude inactive Databricks apps when browsing.
